original_image_tags: A pinkish-red sheet of paper, likely the back of a document, with two hole-punches at the top and some staining. The text is oriented upside-down relative to the main image view. The paper has multiple stamps and faint, reversed text showing through from the front.

elements.description: Two blue FBI stamps reading 'RECEIVED F.B.I. INTERNAL SECURITY' with dates and times 'FP 15 9 01 AM' and '16 6 10 35 AM'. Faint, reversed typewritten text is visible at the top, including the words 'TELETYPE' and 'VAC-4 1941'.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, quoted stamp text and dates that are not present in Description A, which instead describes the page in general terms and mentions 'multiple stamps' without quoting any text, creating a direct contradiction on the specific visual content.
